calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Safavieh International, Llc
Off Calendar Jun-05-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff Ecological Rights Foundation's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement as to defendant Safavieh International, LLC is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098 =302/hk

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-09-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders balance of case is dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-05-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-08-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Jensen Metal Products, Inc.
Off Calendar Aug-09-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF ECOLOGICAL RIGHTS FOUNDATION's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Jensen Metal Products, Inc. is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Written order is signed and filed in open court. The prevailing party shall also submit a [proposed] judgment.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
